title: Night Vision Spyglass
description: Nightvision when looking through a spyglass! Configurable as an enchantment!
body:
## A simple nightvision enchantment for the spyglass
does not interfere with the **potion** effect!

Find the enchantment in **ancient city** loot!


You can toggle the need for an enchantment on or off in the **settings**:
/function nightvision_spyglass:settings

toggling this option will enable or dissable the spawning of the enchantment as well as making it so that every spyglass has nightvision!

## Multiplayer

This Datapack/Mod is fully Serverside, which means that it only needs to be installed on the server in order to work for all clients

_warning:strobing effect when spamming right click_
